content: Proto always

General consensus for Priority, in Terms of Radix Sediment Shop is

Proto Horizon > Timeless Loop > Dusk n Dawn = Battlepass WoDs
ALWAYS get the prototype and timeloop every month, do not buy anything else unless you have 1k saved for next month
itherwise Dusk and Dawn is good, Heart is ok and Annihilated is laughably bad
Hmmm okay thank you guys, I will buy the prototype and timeloop
Wise choice

ummm any guide to level up fast?
I am at level 13 already.
Leveling is gated by milestones, that can be past either by breaking through some story boss, or raising your keeper level
Not really, this game is very time-gated, so unless you regularly consume Stamina Packs at Event or Interlude
It'll be a slow progression
Your character only can be level up if you have both the mats AND the unlock
umm I meant I need to lvl up to unlock some stage farming thing
So "keeper level"
yeh that one
The answer is simple: push the story as far as you can, both in normal and hard mode, and spend your meno as much as you can
(but try to spend it on good things)
That's almost the only sources of keeper xp
well what is the word for upgrade to 2 star of our awakener?
Edify 2?
no, stars can only be aquired by having copies of the character
That's not level.
I have 2 stars, meaning I pulled Liz 3 times (one for the original, plus 2 for the stars)
I thought like when u limit break her after u reach max lvl 20/20
That's not the stars, that's edify
If you go into manual look at the quests there, they give a chunk of keeper exp
yeah only edify?
Also just generally good to do as you're building your account
no special term or smth?
Edify is the way to increase the max level of the character by 10. It has nothing to do with the stars

Im still in the early game but uhh…. 

Nearly all my standard banner pulls went to Sanga, so here I am with her oe. How do I build a team around her?
the stars are called E1, E2, E3.... and OE but that's special as it is like E3 + 4 copies
It has no relation with the levels
any of the 3 new units/wheels banner are worth trying to gacha?
If anything people just refer to the characters as their level, can ignore the term edify altogether it's not particularly referenced

So, to sum up:
- "Edify" increase the max level of the character, you can only edify if you unlocked the milestone by reaching a certain point in the story or having a high keeper level
- Duplicatas of a character (or "dupes" for short), allows the character to have more stars, called E1, E2, E3 and finally OE. That's called "Enlighten"
so hypothetically.. if i do end up swiping my card on the game. What is the best thing i can buy <:24_Clown:1468259444423921871>
Chapter completion packs Preorder BP
In that order

$/pull is something like monthly > preorder > bp > chapter end package = level up package = story end package

#YouSavedMorimens
What's that mean?
It's a Reference to an Old Code that expired roughly a Month ago
It gave 100 Pure Cores, and was originally made to celebrate the revival / rekindling of Morimens
There's also a Post in <#1180845276823564288>
Asking the Devs if they could reinstate the Code or remove Ads that were advertising the relevant Code
As it's not a good look to have Ads featuring Codes that already expired
It seems there has also been a handful of new Players that had came along and were a little upset to find out that the Ad for the Code that had originally drawn them in were already expired
https://tenor.com/view/nilou-genshin-genshin-impact-nilou-eating-paimon-nilou-eat-gif-26959138
